claims.claim: LiveKit clocks TTFT as first-token-minus-request-start at llm/llm.py:296-297
claims.found: L296 'if ttft == -1.0:' L297 'ttft = time.perf_counter() - start_time' where start_time set at L283 task start

claims.claim: Together: Streaming latency = TTFT. Good target ~200-300ms
claims.found: L22 '- **Streaming latency = TTFT.** Good target = **200-300ms** (start producing tokens to feed TTS ASAP).'

claims.claim: Budget dictates model size sweet spot 8-30B; bigger burns budget, smaller loses intelligence + tool-calling
claims.found: L23 'model size sweet spot: 8-30B params. Bigger -> burns latency budget; smaller -> loses intelligence + tool-calling.'

claims.claim: Customers fine-tune smaller models on use-case data to keep tool-calling quality within small-model latency budget
claims.found: L41 'Customers **fine-tune smaller LLMs** on use-case data to raise tool-calling quality while staying within the small-model latency budget.'

claims.claim: Modal LLM = Qwen3-4B-Instruct on vLLM, chosen as small/fast as possible while producing quality answers
claims.found: L34 'LLM: Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 + vLLM. As small/fast as possible while producing quality answers.' (note drops '-2507' suffix, immaterial)

claims.claim: Modal used the LLM Engineer's Almanac to pick the inference engine with lowest TTFT
claims.found: L34 'Used the LLM Engineer's Almanac to pick the inference engine with lowest TTFT (time-to-first-token).'

claims.claim: Modal tuned engine + CUDA-graph compilation to cut TTFT at the expense of cold-start
claims.found: L34 'Tuned engine + CUDA-graph compilation to reduce TTFT (at expense of cold-start).'

claims.claim: Modal takeaway: Pick LLM inference engine by P95 TTFT, not throughput
claims.found: L57 '- **Pick LLM inference engine by P95 TTFT, not throughput.**'

summary: All 8 checkable assertions verified against ground truth. Code_ref (llm.py:296-297) genuinely computes ttft as perf_counter minus start_time on the first event. All together-talk and modal-v2v figures match the source captures verbatim. Only nit: note writes 'Qwen3-4B-Instruct' vs source's 'Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507' (suffix dropped, not a substantive error).
